avatar.container: width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(232,101,90,0.15); border: 2px solid rgba(168,216,234,0.5);

footer.container: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; padding: 16px; color: #6B6B6B; font-size: 13px; border-top: 1px dashed rgba(44,62,80,0.2); background: rgba(245,240,232,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
footer.text: color: inherit; transition: color 0.2s ease; white-space: nowrap;

h2.base: margin: 0; font-size: 1.5em; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.5; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(168,216,234,0.5); padding-bottom: 6px;

h3.base: margin: 28px 0 0; font-size: 1.25em; line-height: 1.5; background: rgba(168,216,234,0.2); padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

base.base: margin: 24px 0 0; font-size: 1.1em; line-height: 1.5; background: rgba(213,198,224,0.2); padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block;

emphasis.strong: font-weight: 700; color: #E8655A; background: rgba(248,213,196,0.3); padding: 0 3px; border-radius: 2px;
emphasis.em: font-style: normal; color: #2C3E50; background: rgba(181,229,207,0.3); padding: 0 3px; border-radius: 2px;

list.item: margin-bottom: 0.7em; font-size: 15px; color: #2C3E50; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(168,216,234,0.1); padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; list-style: none; margin-left: -26px; padding-left: 26px;
list.taskList: list-style: none; margin-left: -22px; font-size: 15px; color: #2C3E50; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(181,229,207,0.15); padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px;

code.block: background: rgba(168,216,234,0.15); padding: 1.2em; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; color: #2C3E50; margin: 1.3em 0; border: 1px dashed rgba(168,216,234,0.4);
code.inline: background: rgba(168,216,234,0.2); padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; color: #2C3E50; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;

styles.quote: border-left: 3px solid #E8655A; padding: 0 0 0 18px; margin: 1.2em 0; color: #2C3E50; font-style: normal; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; background: rgba(248,213,196,0.15); border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.3em auto; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(44,62,80,0.1); border: 2px solid rgba(168,216,234,0.3);
styles.link: color: #E8655A; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(232,101,90,0.4); transition: all 0.2s ease; font-weight: 600;

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1.3em 0; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px dashed rgba(168,216,234,0.4);

styles.hr: border: none; border-top: 2px dashed rgba(44,62,80,0.2); margin: 28px 0;
